7 #include <arcane/ArcaneVersion.h>
8 #include <arcane/utils/Array.h>
9 #include <arcane/utils/ITraceMng.h>

12 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/Expressions/IFunctionR1vR1.h"
13 #include <vector> // For vector use instead of Array
14 #include <arcane/utils/Limits.h> // For boundary behavior, Arcane tools
15 #include <limits> // Boundary behavior std tools (to generate NaN)
16 
17 
18 // Template class PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T. Template argument is the interpolator
19 template<typename T>
20  class PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T :
21  public IPieceWiseFunction, public IFunctionR1vR1
22  {
23  public:
25  typedef T TypeT;
26  typedef typename T::eProlongationType ProlongationType;
27 
28  public:
30  PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T(ITraceMng * trace_mng) :
31  m_trace_mng(trace_mng), m_inserted_point_number(0), m_total_point_number(0),
32  m_inserted_interval_number(0), m_total_interval_number(0),
33  m_border_type(BorderType::InfiniteProlongation),
34  m_prolongation_type(T::ConstantProlongation),
35  m_out_of_bound_value(std::numeric_limits<Real>::quiet_NaN()),
36  m_coef_right_derivative(0), m_coef_left_derivative(0),
37  m_initialized(false), m_filled(false), m_first_point(true), m_boundary_defined(false)
38  {
39  ;
40  }
41 
42  //
43 
45  virtual ~PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T()
46  {
47  ;
48  }
49 
50  public:
51  void init();
52 
54  void setParameter(const String & name, const Real & parameter)
55  {
56  m_trace_mng->fatal() << "No parameter for PieceWiseFunction";
57  }
58  void setParameter(Integer index, const Real & parameter)
59  {
60  m_trace_mng->fatal() << "No parameter for PieceWiseFunction";
61  }
62 
64  Integer nbParameter() const
65  {
66  return 0;
67  }
68 
70  String parameterName(Integer index) const
71  {
72  m_trace_mng->fatal() << "No parameter for PieceWiseFunction";
73  return "";
74  }
75 
77  Integer nbVariable() const
78  {
79  return 1;
80  }

112

117

122  void eval(const ConstArrayView<Real> variable, ArrayView<Real> result);
123

127  private:

129  public:
130  inline Real diffEval(const Real & variable);

134 
136  void printPoints() const;

140  const ProlongationType& prolongation_type,
141  const Real& lower_limit, const Real& upper_limit,

144

147

150  const Real new_ymax);

153

158  ITraceMng * m_trace_mng;
159 
161  String m_name;
162 
164 
166  // typedef Array<Real> ComponentData; // To use Arcane::Array<Real> for storage (more costly at present)
167  // if Array is used : only 2 lines to change in setPoints(x,y) methode : push_back() <=> add()
168  typedef std::vector<Real> ComponentData; // To use std::vector for storage (more efficient cf. doc)
169  ComponentData m_x, m_y, m_x_scan;
170  Real m_x_min, m_x_max, m_y_min, m_y_max;
171  Integer m_first_point_index, m_last_point_index;
172  Integer m_inserted_point_number, m_total_point_number; // m_total_points_number = m_inserted_points_number + boundary_points_number
173  Integer m_current_x_index;
174 
176  typedef std::vector<typename T::IntervalData> InterpolatorIntervalData;
177  InterpolatorIntervalData m_interval;
178  Integer m_first_interval_index, m_last_interval_index, m_first_modified_interval_index, m_last_modified_interval_index;
179  Integer m_inserted_interval_number, m_total_interval_number;// m_total_interval_number = m_inserted_interval_number + boundary_interval_number
180  Integer m_nb_right_interval, m_nb_left_interval; // number of interval at the left and right of the current point
181 
183  BorderType::eBorderType m_border_type;
184  ProlongationType m_prolongation_type;
185  Real m_lower_limit, m_upper_limit, m_out_of_bound_value;
186  Integer m_coef_right_derivative, m_coef_left_derivative; // to define table point derivative choice (right or left)
187 
189  RealConstArrayView m_variable;
190  RealArrayView m_eval_result;
191  RealArrayView m_diff_result;
192 
194  bool m_initialized;
196  bool m_filled;
197  bool m_first_point;
199  bool m_boundary_defined;
200 
202  void addTablePoint(const Real & x, const Real & y);
203  void sort();
204 
206  void computeIntervalCoef();
207  void getConnectedIntervals();
208  void getEffectiveIntervalNumber(Integer x_index);
209 
211  void initBorderType(const BorderType::eBorderType& border_type,
212  const ProlongationType& prolongation_type,
213  const Real& lower_limit, const Real& upper_limit,const BorderType::eCutType& cut_type);
214  void initGhostPoints();
215  void initGhostIntervals();
216  void updateGhostPoints();
217  void updateGhostIntervals();
218  void updateLimitPoints();
219  };
